landing.title: Access and manage your teacher meetings easily.
landing.description: Continue with meeting code and student number.
landing.helper: Continue with meeting code and student number.
staff.loginDescription: Use the local access code on this device to open the staff portal.
staff.loginHelper: This temporary login is local to the browser and can be replaced with Firebase staff auth later.
staff.loginError: The access code is not valid.
staff.dashboardDescription: Look up meeting QR targets and student support links without editing any data.
staff.loadError: Staff dashboard could not be loaded.
staff.schoolLoadError: The selected school could not be loaded for the staff portal.
staff.eventsLoadError: The meeting list could not be loaded for the staff portal.
staff.eventsDescription: Search and select a meeting to show its QR target.
staff.eventsSearchPlaceholder: Search by title, code, or class
staff.eventsEmpty: No active or draft meetings were found.
staff.meetingQrHint: Choose an event to display its meeting QR target.
staff.studentSupportDescription: Choose an event, then look up a student by school number.
staff.studentSearchRequiresEvent: Choose a meeting before searching for a student.
staff.studentSearchRequiresSchoolNumber: Enter a school number before searching.
staff.studentSearchError: The student could not be found for the selected meeting.
staff.studentNotFound: The student could not be found for the selected meeting.
staff.studentSupportHint: Choose an event and search for a student to generate the support QR target.
meeting.title: Student information
meeting.description: Enter the student school number to open the teacher list.
meeting.lookupError: We could not load the meeting details. Please check the meeting code and try again.
meeting.studentNotFound: No student was found for this meeting.
dashboard.title: Student meeting dashboard
dashboard.description: Teacher cards are sorted by building, floor, and classroom.
dashboard.sessionHint: Session and notes automatically expire at the end of today.
dashboard.shareFallback: Sharing is not supported in this browser. You can use the email option instead.
dashboard.loadError: We could not load this student's meeting dashboard. Please check the meeting code and school number, then try again.
admin.loginDescription: Sign in with Google or email/password to continue to the admin area.
admin.emailSignInDescription: Use a manually created Firebase Authentication user for staging or pilot access.
admin.loginError: Google sign-in could not be completed.
admin.invalidCredentials: The email or password is not valid.
admin.loginRateLimited: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again later.
admin.loginNetworkError: A network error occurred while signing in.
admin.accessDeniedTitle: This account is not authorized as an admin.
admin.accessDeniedDescription: This Google account is not on the admin allowlist.
admin.unauthorizedUser: This account is not authorized as an admin.
admin.dashboardDescription: This area only verifies the admin authentication foundation. CRUD actions are not available yet.
admin.pilotSummaryDescription: A compact read-only snapshot of the main operational checks.
admin.pilotSummaryHint: Use the full checklist for detailed event readiness and configuration review.
admin.pilotChecklistDescription: A quick read-only checklist for the pilot launch. It highlights configuration gaps, repository-backed data counts, and event readiness.
admin.pilotChecklistLoadError: Pilot readiness checklist could not be loaded.
admin.pilotChecklistAdminAuthDescription: Firebase Google sign-in with allowlist and custom-claim support is available.
admin.pilotChecklistImportsAvailable: Teacher, class, student, and assignment imports are available.
admin.pilotChecklistNoEvents: No active or draft events are available.
admin.pilotChecklistMockModeDescription: The app is using mock repositories. This is appropriate for development, but the pilot launch should switch to Firestore before production use.
admin.pilotChecklistStaffWarning: The staff portal is using the local fallback access code or no custom code is configured yet.
admin.pilotChecklistNoActiveEventsWarnin: No active events exist. The front desk cannot hand out live meeting QR targets until an event is activated.
admin.pilotChecklistDraftReadinessWarnin: One or more draft events still have readiness errors and cannot be activated safely.
admin.placeholderDescription: The management interface for this section will be added later.
admin.schoolUsersLoadError: School users could not be loaded.
admin.schoolUsersDescription: Manage school-specific admin and staff access for the selected school.
admin.schoolUsersSaveError: School user could not be saved.
admin.schoolUsersValidationRequired: User ID and email are required.
admin.schoolUsersTableTitle: Users assigned to the current school
admin.schoolUsersDeactivateError: School user could not be deactivated.
admin.schoolUsersEmpty: No school users have been added yet.
admin.qrDescription: Create QR codes for the main portal, meeting links, and student support links, then download them as PNG files.
admin.qrBulkDescription: Select one or more events, or print all active and draft events at once.
admin.qrBulkHint: Select the meetings you want to print.
admin.qrAllPrintableSelected: All active and draft events are selected.
admin.qrLoadError: QR page could not be loaded.
admin.qrStudentSupportHint: Choose an event and school number, then generate the support QR code.
admin.qrMeetingsDescription: Each event's meeting code QR can be downloaded separately.
admin.qrPrintInstruction: Students and parents can scan this QR code to open the meeting page.
admin.masterDataSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, number, class, or subject
admin.masterDataLoadError: Master data could not be loaded.
admin.teachersDescription: Review teacher master data and default subjects in read-only mode.
admin.teacherFormDescription: Manage teacher name, default subject, and active status.
admin.teacherFormLoadError: Teacher form could not be loaded.
admin.classesDescription: Review class master data, grades, and class teachers in read-only mode.
admin.classFormDescription: Manage class name, grade, class teacher, and active status.
admin.classFormLoadError: Class form could not be loaded.
admin.classFormRelatedDataWarning: Some related class data could not be loaded, but basic class editing is still available.
admin.teachingAssignmentsDescription: Toggle each teacher for this class and save the subject on the same record.
admin.teachingAssignmentsTeacherDescript: Toggle each class for this teacher and save the subject on the same record.
admin.teachingAssignmentsRelatedDataWarn: Some related teaching data could not be loaded, but the assignment matrix is still available.
admin.teachingAssignmentsAvailableAfterC: Save the class first to manage teaching assignments.
admin.teachingAssignmentsAvailableAfterT: Save the teacher first to manage teaching assignments.
admin.teachingAssignmentsNewRowHint: This row will create a new teaching assignment.
admin.studentsDescription: Review student master data, school numbers, and class assignments in read-only mode.
admin.studentFormDescription: Manage student school number, full name, class, and active status.
admin.studentFormLoadError: Student form could not be loaded.
admin.studentFormSaveError: Student could not be saved. The school number may already be in use.
admin.importTeachersDescription: Preview, validate, and import teacher master data from a CSV or XLSX file.
admin.importWarningDuplicateFullName: Duplicate teacher full name exists in this file; the same name is matched to one record.
admin.importClassesDescription: Preview, validate, and import class master data from a CSV or XLSX file.
admin.importClassExpectedColumns: Expected columns: className, grade, classTeacher, isActive
admin.importClassError: Class import could not be completed.
admin.importClassWarningDuplicateName: Duplicate class name exists in this file; the same name is matched to one record.
admin.importClassWarningTeacherNotFound: Class teacher was not found in the teacher list; it will be saved empty.
admin.importStudentsDescription: Preview, validate, and import student master data from a CSV or XLSX file.
admin.importStudentExpectedColumns: Expected columns: schoolNumber, fullName, className, isActive
admin.importStudentError: Student import could not be completed.

admin.importStudentWarningDuplicateSchoo: Duplicate school number exists in this file; the same number is matched to one student.
admin.importAssignmentsDescription: Preview, validate, and import school-level teaching assignments from a CSV or XLSX file.
admin.importAssignmentExpectedColumns: Expected columns: className, teacherName, subject (optional), isActive
admin.importAssignmentError: Teaching assignment import could not be completed.
admin.importAssignmentValidRowsTitle: Valid teaching assignment rows to import
admin.importAssignmentErrorSubjectMissin: Subject is missing and the teacher has no default subject.

admin.importAssignmentErrorTeacherNotFou: Teacher name did not match an existing teacher.
admin.importAssignmentWarningDuplicateRo: Duplicate row exists for the same class, teacher, and subject; the duplicate is processed as one record.
admin.eventsDescription: Manage events, update drafts, and open teacher assignments.
